title: I found a solution to the Shinji problem
display_title: I found a solution to the Shinji problem
wikitext:
[]: I found a solution to the Shinji/?????? problem. Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Dec 16, 2009 5:38 pm or at least my problem with a certain pairing. i will now quote from the thread about Shinji's sexuality in the eva discussion. skikes wrote: Posted: Tue Dec 15, 2009 8:21 pm Post subject: -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 19 pages discussing Shinji's sexuality? I think it's obvious. He's straight. He's attracted to women. When it shows us the deepest parts of his mind he's not thinking of the dudes in his life naked. He's thinking of the women in his life naked. As far as his flattery over Kaworu's advances goes, isn't that the normal attitude an open minded heterosexual should have? What reaction would you have liked to prove he's straight? Gay bash him? And as far as Shinji opening up to kaworu goes... He knew Kaworu had feelings for him, it made him feel special, he trusted him. No one else had been so open with him and so he felt he could do the same. He cared for Kaworu... as much as a heterosexual man can care for another man. This is all too black and white... while i believe people do fall under catagories... Gay/straight... You need to remember that a str8 person can have strong feelings for the same gender, without wanting to 'bone' them.... though sometimes emotional feelings and physical feelings can get mixed up. Which i think seems to be Shinji's case. A straight man whos gotten everything he wanted from women... in a man.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Wed Dec 16, 2009 5:39 pm There is a reason why that thread was closed. It's you.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Dec 16, 2009 5:41 pm esselfortium wrote: There is a reason why that thread was closed. It's you.

[]: Re: i found a soluion to the Shinji/?????? problem Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Dec 16, 2009 5:46 pm The popular will has spoken.
